nasb.text: Also the fountains of the deep and the floodgates of the sky were closed, and the rain from the sky was restrained;

esv.text: The fountains of the deep and the windows of the heavens were closed, the rain from the heavens was restrained,

cnv.text: 深淵的泉源和天上的窗戶，都關閉起來；天降的大雨也止住了。

ccb.text: 深渊的泉源和天上的水闸都关闭了，大雨也停了。

csbs.text: 深渊的泉源和天上的窗户都关闭了，从天而降的大雨也止住了。
